modes.title: Current Mode
modes.hyperfocusDescription: Deep, sustained attention — ride the wave
modes.driftDescription: Attention is wandering — consider switching tasks
modes.depletedDescription: Take a break — your brain needs rest
modes.startupDescription: Warming up — start with something small

interventions.title: Suggestions
interventions.breakReminder: You've been working for {minutes} minutes. Consider a break.
interventions.taskSwitch: This task seems stuck. Want to try something else?
interventions.energyDrop: Your energy seems lower. Here are some lighter tasks.
interventions.hyperfocusAlert: You're in hyperfocus mode. Remember to hydrate!
interventions.endOfDay: Great work today. Time to wind down.
